title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!
